ttl.name: ENGINE IMMOBILISER SYSTEM (w/o Smart Key System)

step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the Controller Area Network Vehicle Interface Module (CAN VIM). Then connect the CAN VIM to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch to the ON position.
Read the DTCs by following the directions on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.

step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester (with CAN VIM) to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch to the ON position.
Erase the DTCs by following the directions on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.
